name: Speed Dating
description: 90 best, funny, and icebreaker speed dating questions. Flip cards, break the ice, and spark instant connections!

prompts.text: What's special about you?
What's your favorite song?
What is one habit you can't stand?
What's your favorite movie/series?
What would be a reason to break up with someone?
How do you usually spend your Sunday evenings?
Why do you think humans exist?
Have you ever cheated on someone? Or has anyone ever cheated on you?
What do you think about marriage?
What would be a perfect first date for you?
What's the best thing about summer nights?
Which famous person would you like to meet?
What do you think about piercings and tattoos?
Have you ever experienced something supernatural?
Do you remember your first day at school?
What do you usually eat for breakfast?
Have you ever considered moving abroad? If yes, where?
What was the best vacation you've ever had so far?
What do you do for a living?
What's your opinion on drugs?
What's your favorite smell?
How would your best friends describe you?
What's your favorite piece of clothing and why?
Would you like to be famous? Why do you say so?
How would you describe a perfect holiday?
Do you prefer winter or summer?
What is one good thing that happened to you this week?
What's your favorite food?
Who are you closest to in your family?
What is one thing you did understand way too late?
Do you speak any other languages?
What does friendship mean to you?
How would you name your autobiography?
In your opinion, what's the best place to eat?
What's your favorite color?
What was your longest relationship so far and how did it end?
What was your favorite subject in school?
How would you describe your taste in music?
Are you a dog or a cat person?
What is the best job you've ever had?
Have you ever been married?
What do you think, why are you single?
What's your favorite sport?
Who is your celebrity crush?
What is something that you're good at?
Are you a morning person or a night owl?
Do you have kids?
What's your type?
What's the story behind your first kiss?
Do you believe in love at first sight?
What would be your secret superpower?
What is the cheesiest pickup line you've ever heard?
Would you prefer to have 10 children or no children on your own at all?
What do you think about sex on the first date?
If you had a time machine, what would you like to see?
What is your most embarrassing experience?
What's the best joke you've ever heard?
If you would be an animal, what would you be?
If you could have dinner with one famous person, who would you choose?
What do you think about pineapples as a pizza topping?
How was your first drinking experience?
Are you a Gryffindor, Slytherin, Hufflepuff, or Ravenclaw?
In a perfect world, what would be different?
If you had to sing karaoke right now, which song would you pick and why?
What helps you to survive a hangover day?
Have you ever had a bad haircut? What happened?
What's your funniest drunk story so far?
Who is your least favorite famous person and why?
During your childhood, did you prefer playing outside or video games?
If you could marry a fictional character, who would you pick?
How would you define the perfect world?
What's your favorite drink?
What was your dream job as a kid?
When is your birthday?
What do you think about equality?
Where would you like to live?
What did you like and don't like about school?
How was your day?
Who is the best person you know and why?
How was your last Christmas?
If you had to change one thing about yourself, what would you pick and why?
Do you believe in zodiac signs?
What's your favorite book?
How much time do you spend in front of a mirror every day?
If we would go on a date in a restaurant, what would you order?
What do you think about politicians?
What do you think about supernatural experiences?
How was your first driving lesson?
Did you have any pets while growing up?
What are your hobbies?
